name: Bake Cherry Chesse Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Add the sweetened condensed milk and beat until smooth.
3. Stir in the concentrated lemon juice and vanilla extract.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared graham cracker crust.
5. Chill for 3 hours or until set.
6. Top with the desired amount of cherry pie filling before serving.
7. Refrigerate leftovers.
